meta.batch: Round 2 exact-originals (reverse-searched via TinEye + Google Lens)
meta.verdict: Claudiu grabbed watermark-free STOCK previews for 6 of 9. The 'exact original' for those = the paid stock asset (buy for clean full-res). Zalau = free Wikimedia. Sfantu Gheorghe = tourism-board promo (gray). Vaslui = no image sent.

cities.subject: Ștefan cel Mare statue + cathedral
cities.best_res: stock full-res (a 7277x4346 copy is loose on a news CDN)

cities.subject: Main square, cobblestone plaza
cities.exact_original: romaniatourism.com promo photo (not stock, not clearly free)
cities.note: Copyright-gray — not a clean buy. Use it, or source a clean alternative.
cities.alternative: BUY stock central-square (fountain+clock tower): shutterstock.com/search/sfantu-gheorghe or Dreamstime. OR free Wikimedia (do a Commons MediaSearch 'Sfântu Gheorghe'/'Sepsiszentgyörgy' — category naming inconsistent), attribute. Recommend stock for a guaranteed clean hero.

cities.subject: Reformed Church
cities.note: Exact original, free. Fetch from the Commons file page, read license there (old upload — CC BY-SA/GFDL), attribute.
